free_text: Xenon isotopes' cross sections in reactions of
high-energy protons with Ba, REE, Ta, W and Re
Targets were specially welded glasses with 10% of Ba or
REE. Ta, W, Re foils of 200 mg/cm2 thickness.
Thin glasses (0.6 - 0.8 mm) were used at Ep= 25, 50 MeV
Thick glasses (1. - 2. mm) were used at Ep= 30, 70 GeV
Experiments with Ba, La, Ce at
SD: prim.ref was added; data were revised.
No information about source of uncertainties
SD: data were revised according to the
Tbl.1 of GEK,12,1737,1985. SF4=Xe-24 -> ELEM/MASS in
REACTION code. Info from Subents 003-008 was included.
No information about source of uncertainties
